sections.name: listening
sections.description: Part 1 (10 items): Listen to a short dialogue and judge if the statement is true or false. Part 2 (10 items): Listen to a sentence and choose the matching picture from three options. Part 3 (10 items): Listen to a short dialogue and choose the correct answer from three options. Part 4 (5 items): Listen to a sentence and choose the correct response.

sections.name: reading
sections.description: Part 1 (5 items): Match words to pictures. Part 2 (5 items): Match sentences to pictures. Part 3 (10 items): Choose the correct word to complete a sentence. Part 4 (10 items): Arrange words into the correct sentence order.

scoring_notes: Each section scored 0–100. Total is sum of sections. 120/200 required to pass. No writing section at HSK 2.
